content.stem: In this color sequence, Red-Blue-Blue-Red-Green-Green-Red-Yellow-Yellow-?, what color comes next based on the underlying pattern?
content.explanation: The pattern is: Red (single), then pairs of colors (Blue-Blue, Green-Green, Yellow-Yellow), with Red appearing as a separator after each pair. After Yellow-Yellow, Red should appear again as the separator.

metadata.cognitive_skill: complex sequential pattern with embedded separators

distractor_rationale.reasoning: Student continues the double-yellow pattern instead of recognizing separator
Student thinks pattern introduces new colors in sequence
Student thinks pattern cycles through the paired colors
